duas.title: Morning Remembrance
duas.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillah, wal-hamdu lillah, la ilaha illa-llahu wahdahu la sharika lah
duas.translation: We have entered the morning and the kingdom belongs to Allah. Praise is to Allah. There is no god but Allah, alone, with no partner.
duas.meaning: A morning declaration of Allah's sovereignty and oneness.

duas.title: Evening Remembrance
duas.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillah, wal-hamdu lillah, la ilaha illa-llahu wahdahu la sharika lah
duas.translation: We have entered the evening and the kingdom belongs to Allah. Praise is to Allah. There is no god but Allah, alone, with no partner.
duas.meaning: An evening declaration of Allah's sovereignty.

duas.title: Before Eating
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.
duas.meaning: Begin every meal in the name of Allah.

duas.title: After Eating
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi at'amani hadha wa razaqanihi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah
duas.translation: Praise is to Allah who has fed me this and provided it for me without any might or power on my part.
duas.meaning: Gratitude after eating.

duas.title: Before Sleep
duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya
duas.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.
duas.meaning: Surrendering to Allah before sleep.

duas.title: Upon Waking
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur
duas.translation: Praise is to Allah who gave us life after death, and to Him is the resurrection.
duas.meaning: Recited upon waking from sleep.

duas.title: Ayat al-Kursi for Protection
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa Huwa, Al-Hayyul-Qayyum. La ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa la nawm, lahu ma fis-samawati wa ma fil-'ard. Man dhal-ladhi yashfa'u 'indahu illa bi-idhnih. Ya'lamu ma bayna aydihim wa ma khalfahum, wa la yuhituna bi shai'im-min 'ilmihi illa bima sha'a. Wasi'a kursiyyuhus-samawati wal-ard, wa la ya'uduhu hifdhuhuma wa Huwal- 'Aliyyul-'Adheem.
duas.translation: Allah! There is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of [all] existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
duas.meaning: Whoever recites it before sleep, Allah will protect him until morning.

duas.title: Travel Dua
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin, wa inna ila rabbina lamunqalibun
duas.translation: Glory be to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could never have it (otherwise). And to our Lord we shall surely return.
duas.meaning: Recited when starting a journey.

duas.title: Entering a New Place
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bikalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.
duas.meaning: Protection when entering an unfamiliar place.

duas.title: Dua for Healing
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ، أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ، اشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي، لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ، شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma rabban-nas, adhhibil-ba's, ishfi antash-shafi, la shifa'a illa shifa'uk, shifa'an la yughadiru saqama
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the harm and heal, You are the Healer. There is no healing except Your healing, a healing that leaves no illness behind.
duas.meaning: Prophetic supplication for the sick.

duas.title: Visiting the Sick
duas.arabic: لَا بَأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: La ba'sa tahurun insha'Allah
duas.translation: Do not worry, it is a purification, if Allah wills.
duas.meaning: Comfort for one who is ill.

duas.title: Dua of Anxiety & Sorrow
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ، ابْنُ عَبْدِكَ، ابْنُ أَمَتِكَ، نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ، مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ، عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ، أَسْأَلُكَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ سَمَّيْتَ بِهِ نَفْسَكَ، أَوْ أَنْزَلْتَهُ فِي كِتَابِكَ، أَوْ عَلَّمْتَهُ أَحَدًا مِنْ خَلْقِكَ، أَوِ اسْتَأْثَرْتَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِ الْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ، أَنْ تَجْعَلَ الْقُرْآنَ رَبِيعَ قَلْبِي، وَنُورَ صَدْرِي، وَجَلَاءَ حُزْنِي، وَذَهَابَ هَمِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni 'abduka, ibnu 'abdika, ibnu amatika, nasiyati biyadika, madin fiyya hukmuka, 'adlun fiyya qada'uka, as'aluka bikulli ismin huwa laka, sammayta bihi nafsaka, aw anzaltahu fi kitabika, aw 'allamtahu ahadan min khalqika, awista'tharta bihi fi 'ilmil-ghaybi 'indaka, an taj'alal-Qur'ana rabi'a qalbi, wa nura sadri, wa jala'a huzni, wa dhahaba hammi.
duas.translation: O Allah, I am Your slave and the son of Your male slave and the son of Your female slave. My forehead is in Your Hand. Your judgement upon me is assured and Your decree concerning me is just. I ask You by every Name that You have named Yourself with, revealed in Your Book, taught any one of Your creation or kept unto Yourself in the knowledge of the unseen that is with You, to make the Qur'an the spring of my heart, and the light of my chest, the banisher of my sadness and the reliever of my distress.
duas.meaning: Comprehensive dua for distress and anxiety.

duas.title: Refuge from Worry
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ، وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ، وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan, wal-'ajzi wal-kasal, wal-bukhli wal-jubn, wa dala'id-dayn, wa ghalabatir-rijal
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, miserliness and cowardice, the burden of debts and being overpowered by men.
duas.meaning: A daily supplication of the Prophet ﷺ.

duas.title: Dua for Provision
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahummak-fini bihalalika 'an haramik, wa aghnini bifadlika 'amman siwak
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have made lawful instead of what You have made unlawful, and make me independent of all others by Your favour.
duas.meaning: Seeking lawful sustenance.

duas.title: Increase in Sustenance
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا، وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds.
duas.meaning: Said after Fajr prayer.

duas.title: Sayyid al-Istighfar
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ، وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata'tu, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, abu'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u bidhanbi faghfir li, fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa anta.
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You, You created me and I am Your servant and I abide to Your covenant and promise as best I can, I take refuge in You from the evil of which I have committed. I acknowledge Your favour upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for verily none can forgive sin except You.
duas.meaning: The master supplication of forgiveness.

duas.title: Seeking Pardon
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma innaka 'afuwwun tuhibbul-'afwa fa'fu 'anni
duas.translation: O Allah, You are Most Forgiving and You love forgiveness, so forgive me.
duas.meaning: Recommended in the last 10 nights of Ramadan.

duas.title: Dua for Righteous Offspring
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa dhurriyyatina qurrata a'yunin waj'alna lil-muttaqina imama
duas.translation: Our Lord, grant us from among our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us a leader for the righteous.
duas.meaning: Asking Allah for piety in family.

duas.title: Dua for Parents
duas.arabic: رَبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbir-hamhuma kama rabbayani saghira
duas.translation: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they brought me up when I was small.
duas.meaning: Showing kindness and praying for parents.

duas.title: Breaking the Fast
duas.arabic: ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ وَابْتَلَّتِ الْعُرُوقُ وَثَبَتَ الْأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Dhahaba-zama'u wabtallatil-'uruqu wa thabatal-ajru insha'Allah
duas.translation: The thirst is gone, the veins are quenched, and the reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.
duas.meaning: Said when breaking the fast.

duas.title: Laylat al-Qadr
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ كَرِيمٌ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma innaka 'afuwwun karimun tuhibbul-'afwa fa'fu 'anni
duas.translation: O Allah, You are Most Forgiving, Most Generous; You love forgiveness, so forgive me.
duas.meaning: Recommended supplication for Laylat al-Qadr.

duas.title: Talbiyah
duas.arabic: لَبَّيْكَ اللَّهُمَّ لَبَّيْكَ، لَبَّيْكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ لَبَّيْكَ، إِنَّ الْحَمْدَ وَالنِّعْمَةَ لَكَ وَالْمُلْكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ
duas.transliteration: Labbayk Allahumma labbayk, labbayka la sharika laka labbayk, innal-hamda wan-ni'mata laka wal-mulk, la sharika lak
duas.translation: Here I am, O Allah, here I am. Here I am, You have no partner, here I am. All praise, blessings, and dominion belong to You. You have no partner.
duas.meaning: The defining call of pilgrimage.

duas.title: Between the Two Corners
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina 'adhaban-nar
duas.translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and save us from the punishment of the Fire.
duas.meaning: Recited between the Yemeni Corner and the Black Stone.

duas.title: Entering the Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa 'ala Allahi rabbina tawakkalna
duas.translation: In the name of Allah we enter, in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we rely.
duas.meaning: Said upon entering the home.

duas.title: Refuge from Distress
duas.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: Hasbiyallahu la ilaha illa huwa 'alayhi tawakkaltu wa huwa rabbul-'arshil-'azim
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god but He. In Him I place my trust, and He is the Lord of the Magnificent Throne.
duas.meaning: Whoever says it seven times morning and evening, Allah will suffice him in any matter.

duas.title: Entering the Masjid
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-ftah li abwaba rahmatik
duas.translation: O Allah, open for me the gates of Your mercy.
duas.meaning: Said upon entering the masjid.

duas.title: Leaving the Masjid
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You of Your bounty.
duas.meaning: Said upon leaving the masjid.

duas.title: Entering the Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa 'ala-llahi rabbina tawakkalna
duas.translation: In the name of Allah we enter, and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we rely.
duas.meaning: Entering one's home.

duas.title: Sayyid al-Istighfar (Master of Seeking Forgiveness)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ، وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata'tu, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, abu'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u bidhanbi faghfir li, fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa anta.
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You, You created me and I am Your servant and I abide to Your covenant and promise as best I can, I take refuge in You from the evil of which I have committed. I acknowledge Your favour upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for verily none can forgive sin except You.
duas.meaning: Whoever recites this in the morning believing in it and dies that day will enter Paradise.

duas.title: Subhan-Allah & Alhamdulillah 100x
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ، سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: Subhan-Allahi wa bi-hamdihi, subhan-Allahil-'azim
duas.translation: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him; glory is to Allah the Most Great.
duas.meaning: Two phrases light on the tongue, heavy on the scales, beloved to the Most Merciful.

duas.title: Last Three Surahs at Night
duas.arabic:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ. اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ. لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ. وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ.

بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ. مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ. وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ. وَمِن شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ. وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ.

بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ. مَلِكِ النَّاسِ. إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ. مِن شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ. الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ. مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ.
duas.transliteration:
[Al-Ikhlas]
Bismillahir-Rahmanir-Rahim. Qul Huwa Allahu Ahad. Allahus-Samad. Lam yalid wa lam yulad. Wa lam yakul-lahu kufuwan ahad.

[Al-Falaq]
Bismillahir-Rahmanir-Rahim. Qul a'udhu bi rabbil-falaq. Min sharri ma khalaq. Wa min sharri ghasiqin idha waqab. Wa min sharrin-naffathati fil-'uqad. Wa min sharri hasidin idha hasad.

[An-Nas]
Bismillahir-Rahmanir-Rahim. Qul a'udhu bi rabbin-nas. Malikin-nas. Ilahin-nas. Min sharril-waswasil-khannas. Alladhi yuwaswisu fi sudurin-nas. Minal-jinnati wan-nas.
duas.translation:
[Al-Ikhlas] Say, 'He is Allah, [who is] One. Allah, the Eternal Refuge. He neither begets nor is born. Nor is there to Him any equivalent.'

[Al-Falaq] Say, 'I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak. From the evil of that which He created. And from the evil of darkness when it settles. And from the evil of the blowers in knots. And from the evil of an envier when he envies.'

[An-Nas] Say, 'I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind. The Sovereign of mankind. The God of mankind. From the evil of the retreating whisperer. Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind. From among the jinn and mankind.'
duas.meaning: A Prophetic practice for protection during sleep.

duas.title: Ayat al-Kursi before Sleep
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa Huwa, Al-Hayyul-Qayyum. La ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa la nawm, lahu ma fis-samawati wa ma fil-'ard. Man dhal-ladhi yashfa'u 'indahu illa bi-idhnih. Ya'lamu ma bayna aydihim wa ma khalfahum, wa la yuhituna bi shai'im-min 'ilmihi illa bima sha'a. Wasi'a kursiyyuhus-samawati wal-ard, wa la ya'uduhu hifdhuhuma wa Huwal- 'Aliyyul-'Adheem.
duas.translation: Allah! There is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of [all] existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
duas.meaning: Angelic protection through the night.

duas.title: Dua of Yunus ('a)
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu minaz-zalimin
duas.translation: There is no deity but You. Glory be to You. Indeed, I was of the wrongdoers.
duas.meaning: No Muslim calls upon Allah with this in distress except that Allah answers him.

duas.title: Dua for Anxiety and Sorrow
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ، ابْنُ عَبْدِكَ، ابْنُ أَمَتِكَ، نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ، مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ، عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ، أَسْأَلُكَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ سَمَّيْتَ بِهِ نَفْسَكَ، أَوْ أَنْزَلْتَهُ فِي كِتَابِكَ، أَوْ عَلَّمْتَهُ أَحَدًا مِنْ خَلْقِكَ، أَوِ اسْتَأْثَرْتَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِ الْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ، أَنْ تَجْعَلَ الْقُرْآنَ رَبِيعَ قَلْبِي، وَنُورَ صَدْرِي، وَجَلَاءَ حُزْنِي، وَذَهَابَ هَمِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni 'abduka, ibnu 'abdika, ibnu amatika, nasiyati biyadika, madin fiyya hukmuka, 'adlun fiyya qada'uka, as'aluka bikulli ismin huwa laka, sammayta bihi nafsaka, aw anzaltahu fi kitabika, aw 'allamtahu ahadan min khalqika, awista'tharta bihi fi 'ilmil-ghaybi 'indaka, an taj'alal-Qur'ana rabi'a qalbi, wa nura sadri, wa jala'a huzni, wa dhahaba hammi.
duas.translation: O Allah, I am Your slave and the son of Your male slave and the son of Your female slave. My forehead is in Your Hand. Your judgement upon me is assured and Your decree concerning me is just. I ask You by every Name that You have named Yourself with, revealed in Your Book, taught any one of Your creation or kept unto Yourself in the knowledge of the unseen that is with You, to make the Qur'an the spring of my heart, and the light of my chest, the banisher of my sadness and the reliever of my distress.
duas.meaning: Comprehensive refuge from worldly distress.

duas.title: Hasbun-Allahu wa Ni'mal-Wakil
duas.arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
duas.transliteration: Hasbunallahu wa ni'mal-wakil
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best Disposer of affairs.
duas.meaning: Ibrahim ('a) said it when cast into the fire; the Companions said it at Uhud.

duas.title: Istighfar of the Prophet ﷺ
duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيَّ الْقَيُّومَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullahal-'Azim-alladhi la ilaha illa huwal-hayyul-qayyumu wa atubu ilayh
duas.translation: I seek the forgiveness of Allah, there is no god but He, the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting, and I turn to Him in repentance.
duas.meaning: His sins are forgiven even if he fled from battle.

duas.title: Dua of Adam ('a) and Hawwa
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنْفُسَنَا وَإِنْ لَمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana zalamna anfusana wa in lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna lanakunanna minal-khasirin
duas.translation: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy on us, we will surely be among the losers.
duas.meaning: The plea of our parents Adam and Hawwa after the slip.

duas.title: Dua for Lawful Sustenance
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-kfini bi-halalika 'an haramik, wa aghnini bi-fadlika 'amman siwak
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have made lawful from what You have made unlawful, and make me free of need from all besides You by Your bounty.
duas.meaning: A dua of the Prophet ﷺ for halal rizq.

duas.title: Dua for Increase in Knowledge and Sustenance
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا، وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds.
duas.meaning: Recited by the Prophet ﷺ after Fajr prayer.

duas.title: Dua for Visiting the Sick
duas.arabic: لَا بَأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: La ba'sa, tahurun insha'Allah
duas.translation: No harm, (may it be a) purification (from sin), if Allah wills.
duas.meaning: A consolation for the ill.

duas.title: Ruqyah: Shifa (Healing) Dua
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ، أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ، اشْفِهِ وَأَنْتَ الشَّافِي، لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ، شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma rabban-nas, adh-hibil-ba's, ishfihi wa antash-shafi, la shifa'a illa shifa'uk, shifa'an la yughadiru saqaman
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of the people, remove the hardship, cure him — for You are the Healer. There is no cure except Your cure, a cure that leaves no illness.
duas.meaning: Ruqyah from the Prophet ﷺ for the sick.

duas.title: Dua for Righteous Offspring
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa dhurriyyatina qurrata a'yunin waj'alna lil-muttaqina imama
duas.translation: Our Lord, grant us from among our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes, and make us leaders for the righteous.
duas.meaning: Dua of the 'Ibad ar-Rahman (servants of the Most Merciful).

duas.title: Dua for Parents
duas.arabic: رَبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbi-rhamhuma kama rabbayani saghira
duas.translation: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they raised me when I was small.
duas.meaning: Quranic dua for one's parents.

duas.title: Dua upon Starting a Journey
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin, wa inna ila Rabbina la-munqalibun
duas.translation: Glory be to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could never have it (by our efforts), and to our Lord we will indeed return.
duas.meaning: Said when boarding a vehicle or mount.

duas.title: Dua on Laylat al-Qadr
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma innaka 'afuwwun tuhibbul-'afwa fa'fu 'anni
duas.translation: O Allah, You are Most Forgiving, You love forgiveness, so forgive me.
duas.meaning: Taught by the Prophet ﷺ to 'Aisha (ra) for the Night of Decree.

duas.title: Dua at Iftar (Breaking the Fast)
duas.arabic: ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ، وَابْتَلَّتِ الْعُرُوقُ، وَثَبَتَ الْأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Dhahabaz-zama'u, wabtallatil-'uruqu, wa thabatal-ajru insha'Allah
duas.translation: The thirst is gone, the veins are moistened, and the reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.
duas.meaning: Said when breaking the fast.

duas.title: Talbiyah
duas.arabic: لَبَّيْكَ اللَّهُمَّ لَبَّيْكَ، لَبَّيْكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ لَبَّيْكَ، إِنَّ الْحَمْدَ وَالنِّعْمَةَ لَكَ وَالْمُلْكَ، لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ
duas.transliteration: Labbayk-Allahumma labbayk, labbayka la sharika laka labbayk, innal-hamda wan-ni'mata laka wal-mulk, la sharika lak
duas.translation: Here I am, O Allah, here I am. Here I am; You have no partner; here I am. Indeed all praise, grace and sovereignty belong to You. You have no partner.
duas.meaning: The Talbiyah of Hajj and Umrah.

duas.title: A'udhu bi-Kalimatillah
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bi-kalimatil-lahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.
duas.meaning: Whoever says this three times in the evening, nothing will harm him that night.

duas.title: Evening Protection
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah-illadhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwas-sami'ul-'alim
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing in the earth or sky can cause harm, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
duas.meaning: Said 3x in morning and evening; no sudden harm will befall you.

duas.title: Refuge from Shaytan
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ السَّمِيعِ الْعَلِيمِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ، مِنْ هَمْزِهِ وَنَفْخِهِ وَنَفْثِهِ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu billahis-sami'il-'alimi minash-shaytanir-rajim, min hamzihi wa nafkhihi wa nafthih
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah the All-Hearing, All-Knowing, from the accursed Satan, from his prompting, his puffing up, and his blowing.
duas.meaning: Recited before entering salah.

duas.title: Refuge from Four Evils
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ، وَمِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'adhabi jahannam, wa min 'adhabil-qabr, wa min fitnatil-mahya wal-mamat, wa min sharri fitnatil-masihid-dajjal
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of Hell, from the punishment of the grave, from the trial of life and death, and from the evil of the trial of the Dajjal.
duas.meaning: Recited in the last tashahhud before salam.

duas.title: Dua for Increase in Knowledge
duas.arabic: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.transliteration: Rabbi zidni 'ilma
duas.translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.
duas.meaning: A Qur'anic supplication for seekers of knowledge.

duas.title: Refuge from Useless Knowledge
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ لَا يَنْفَعُ، وَمِنْ قَلْبٍ لَا يَخْشَعُ، وَمِنْ نَفْسٍ لَا تَشْبَعُ، وَمِنْ دَعْوَةٍ لَا يُسْتَجَابُ لَهَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'ilmin la yanfa', wa min qalbin la yakhsha', wa min nafsin la tashba', wa min da'watin la yustajabu laha
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from knowledge that does not benefit, a heart that does not feel awe, a soul that is never satisfied, and a supplication that is not answered.
duas.meaning: Comprehensive spiritual refuge.

duas.title: Dua upon Marriage (for the Spouse)
duas.arabic: بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ، وَبَارَكَ عَلَيْكَ، وَجَمَعَ بَيْنَكُمَا فِي خَيْرٍ
duas.transliteration: Barakallahu lak, wa baraka 'alayk, wa jama'a baynakuma fi khayr
duas.translation: May Allah bless you, and send blessings upon you, and unite you both in goodness.
duas.meaning: A Prophetic congratulation to the newlyweds.

duas.title: Dua on the Wedding Night
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا وَشَرِّ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayraha wa khayra ma jabaltaha 'alayh, wa a'udhu bika min sharriha wa sharri ma jabaltaha 'alayh
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for her goodness and the goodness of what You have created her upon, and I seek refuge in You from her evil and the evil of what You have created her upon.
duas.meaning: Said by the husband placing his hand on his new wife's forehead.

duas.title: Salat al-Istikhara Dua
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ، وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ، فَإِنَّكَ تَقْدِرُ وَلَا أَقْدِرُ، وَتَعْلَمُ وَلَا أَعْلَمُ، وَأَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni astakhiruka bi-'ilmik, wa astaqdiruka bi-qudratik, wa as'aluka min fadlikal-'azim, fa-innaka taqdiru wa la aqdir, wa ta'lamu wa la a'lam, wa anta 'allamul-ghuyub
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek Your guidance by Your knowledge, and ability by Your power, and I ask You of Your great bounty. For You are able and I am not, You know and I do not, and You are the Knower of the unseen…
duas.meaning: The full istikhara prayer for seeking Allah's choice. (continued in reference)

duas.title: Dua between the Two Sajdahs
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي، رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي
duas.transliteration: Rabbi-ghfir li, Rabbi-ghfir li
duas.translation: My Lord, forgive me. My Lord, forgive me.
duas.meaning: Said between the two prostrations.

duas.title: Ruku' Tasbih
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: Subhana Rabbiyal-'Azim
duas.translation: Glory is to my Lord, the Most Great.
duas.meaning: Recited 3x (or more) in ruku'.

duas.title: Sujud Tasbih
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْأَعْلَى
duas.transliteration: Subhana Rabbiyal-A'la
duas.translation: Glory is to my Lord, the Most High.
duas.meaning: Recited 3x (or more) in sujud.

duas.title: Dua before Salam (Final Tashahhud)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي ظُلْمًا كَثِيرًا، وَلَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَغْفِرَةً مِنْ عِنْدِكَ، وَارْحَمْنِي إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni zalamtu nafsi zulman kathira, wa la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa anta, faghfir li maghfiratan min 'indika, warhamni innaka antal-ghafurur-rahim
duas.translation: O Allah, I have wronged myself greatly, and none forgives sins but You, so grant me forgiveness from You and have mercy on me. Truly You are the Forgiving, the Merciful.
duas.meaning: Taught by the Prophet ﷺ to Abu Bakr (ra).

duas.title: Khatm al-Qur'an Dua
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْحَمْنِي بِالْقُرْآنِ، وَاجْعَلْهُ لِي إِمَامًا وَنُورًا وَهُدًى وَرَحْمَةً
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-rhamni bil-Qur'an, waj'alhu li imaman wa nuran wa hudan wa rahma
duas.translation: O Allah, have mercy on me through the Qur'an, and make it for me a leader, a light, a guidance, and a mercy.
duas.meaning: Said upon completing the Qur'an.
duas.reference: Narrated from salaf; recommended in Ibn al-Qayyim, Zad al-Ma'ad

duas.title: Inna Lillahi (At the Time of Calamity)
duas.arabic: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ، اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي، وَأَخْلِفْ لِي خَيْرًا مِنْهَا
duas.transliteration: Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un. Allahumma ajirni fi musibati, wa akhlif li khayran minha
duas.translation: Indeed, we belong to Allah, and indeed to Him we shall return. O Allah, reward me in my affliction and replace it with something better.
duas.meaning: Recited when afflicted with any calamity — Allah promises to replace it with better.

duas.title: Janazah (Funeral) Dua
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ، وَعَافِهِ وَاعْفُ عَنْهُ، وَأَكْرِمْ نُزُلَهُ، وَوَسِّعْ مُدْخَلَهُ، وَاغْسِلْهُ بِالْمَاءِ وَالثَّلْجِ وَالْبَرَدِ، وَنَقِّهِ مِنَ الْخَطَايَا كَمَا يُنَقَّى الثَّوْبُ الْأَبْيَضُ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-ghfir lahu warhamhu, wa 'afihi wa'fu 'anhu, wa akrim nuzulah, wa wassi' mudkhalah, waghsilhu bil-ma'i wath-thalji wal-barad, wa naqqihi minal-khataya kama yunaqqath-thawbul-abyadu minad-danas
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive him and have mercy on him; give him peace and absolve him; receive him with honor and make his entry spacious; wash him with water, snow and hail; and cleanse him from sins as a white robe is cleansed from filth.
duas.meaning: Part of the funeral prayer for the deceased.

duas.title: Upon Hearing the Adhan — Dua
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ، وَالصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ، آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ، وَابْعَثْهُ مَقَامًا مَحْمُودًا الَّذِي وَعَدْتَهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma rabba hadhihid-da'watit-tammah, was-salatil-qa'imah, ati Muhammadanil-wasilata wal-fadilah, wab'athhu maqaman mahmudan-alladhi wa'adtah
duas.translation: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and the established prayer, grant Muhammad the wasilah and the virtue, and raise him to the praised station You have promised him.
duas.meaning: Whoever says this after the adhan, my intercession becomes due for him.

duas.title: Between Adhan and Iqamah
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-'afwa wal-'afiyata fid-dunya wal-akhirah
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in this world and the Hereafter.
duas.meaning: Dua made between adhan and iqamah is not rejected.

duas.title: Dua for Entering the Toilet
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبُثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-khubuthi wal-khaba'ith
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from male and female devils.
duas.meaning: Said before entering the bathroom.

duas.title: Dua for Leaving the Toilet
duas.arabic: غُفْرَانَكَ
duas.transliteration: Ghufranak
duas.translation: I seek Your forgiveness.
duas.meaning: Said upon leaving the bathroom.

duas.title: After Wudu
duas.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
duas.transliteration: Ashhadu an la ilaha illa-llahu wahdahu la sharika lahu, wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluh
duas.translation: I bear witness that there is no deity but Allah alone, with no partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and messenger.
duas.meaning: All eight gates of Paradise are opened for whoever says this after wudu.

duas.title: Dua of Riding/Transport
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu-lillah, subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin
duas.translation: Praise be to Allah. Glory is to Him who has subjected this to us; we could not have subdued it.
duas.meaning: Upon mounting a ride.

duas.title: Before Sleeping — Bismika Allahumma
duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya
duas.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.
duas.meaning: Said when going to sleep.

duas.title: Upon Waking
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَمَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu-lillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur
duas.translation: Praise is to Allah who gave us life after causing us to die, and to Him is the resurrection.
duas.meaning: First words upon waking from sleep.

duas.title: After Bad Dream
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ غَضَبِهِ وَعِقَابِهِ، وَشَرِّ عِبَادِهِ، وَمِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَأَنْ يَحْضُرُونِ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bi-kalimatillahit-tammati min ghadabihi wa 'iqabihi, wa sharri 'ibadihi, wa min hamazatish-shayatini wa an yahdurun
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from His wrath and punishment, from the evil of His slaves, and from the whisperings of devils and their presence.
duas.meaning: Said after a nightmare; spit lightly to the left three times, change side.

duas.title: Dua in Severe Distress
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَرَبُّ الْأَرْضِ وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahul-'azimul-halim, la ilaha illallahu rabbul-'arshil-'azim, la ilaha illallahu rabbus-samawati wa rabbul-ardi wa rabbul-'arshil-karim
duas.translation: There is no deity but Allah, the Great, the Forbearing. There is no deity but Allah, Lord of the great Throne. There is no deity but Allah, Lord of the heavens, Lord of the earth, and Lord of the noble Throne.
duas.meaning: Prophetic dua at times of grave distress.

duas.title: Dua for Ease in Difficulty
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma la sahla illa ma ja'altahu sahla, wa anta taj'alul-hazna idha shi'ta sahla
duas.translation: O Allah, there is no ease except what You have made easy, and You make grief easy if You wish.
duas.meaning: A gentle plea when tasks feel heavy.

duas.title: Dua in Fear
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَجْعَلُكَ فِي نُحُورِهِمْ، وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شُرُورِهِمْ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inna naj'aluka fi nuhurihim, wa na'udhu bika min shururihim
duas.translation: O Allah, we place You at their throats, and we seek refuge in You from their evil.
duas.meaning: When afraid of people.

duas.title: Dua for Pain (Point to area)
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ (×٣) أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ وَأُحَاذِرُ (×٧)
duas.transliteration: Bismillah (3x). A'udhu billahi wa qudratihi min sharri ma ajidu wa uhadhir (7x)
duas.translation: In the name of Allah (3x). I seek refuge in Allah and His power from the evil of what I find and fear (7x).
duas.meaning: Place the hand on the area of pain and recite.

duas.title: Dua for Incurable Illness
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْبَرَصِ، وَالْجُنُونِ، وَالْجُذَامِ، وَمِنْ سَيِّئِ الْأَسْقَامِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-barasi, wal-junun, wal-judhami, wa min sayyi'il-asqam
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from leprosy, insanity, vitiligo, and evil diseases.
duas.meaning: Protection from chronic diseases.

duas.title: Dua When Visiting the Sick (7x)
duas.arabic: أَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ أَنْ يَشْفِيَكَ
duas.transliteration: As'alullahal-'azim, rabbal-'arshil-'azim, an yashfiyak
duas.translation: I ask Allah the Great, Lord of the Great Throne, to heal you.
duas.meaning: Said 7 times while visiting the sick — Allah will cure them if the end has not come.

duas.title: Dua for Ample Rizq
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ، فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَمْلِكُهَا إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlika wa rahmatik, fa-innahu la yamlikuha illa anta
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You of Your bounty and mercy, for no one owns them but You.
duas.meaning: A general dua for blessings in sustenance.

duas.title: Dua for Relief from Debt
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-kfini bi-halalika 'an haramik, wa aghnini bi-fadlika 'amman siwak
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice me with the lawful from the unlawful, and by Your bounty enrich me from all besides You.
duas.meaning: Taught by the Prophet ﷺ to relieve debt.

duas.title: Dua When Debt Overwhelms
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَلَبَةِ الدَّيْنِ وَقَهْرِ الرِّجَالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan, wa a'udhu bika minal-'ajzi wal-kasal, wa a'udhu bika minal-jubni wal-bukhl, wa a'udhu bika min ghalabatid-dayni wa qahrir-rijal
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, cowardice and miserliness, being overwhelmed by debt, and being overcome by men.
duas.meaning: Complete refuge from life's burdens.

duas.title: Universal Forgiveness Dua
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَإِسْرَافَنَا فِي أَمْرِنَا، وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا، وَانْصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana-ghfir lana dhunubana wa israfana fi amrina, wa thabbit aqdamana, wansurna 'alal-qawmil-kafirin
duas.translation: Our Lord, forgive us our sins and our excess in our affair, and make our feet firm, and help us against the disbelieving people.
duas.meaning: Dua of the steadfast in battle.

duas.title: Dua for All Believers
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلِإِخْوَانِنَا الَّذِينَ سَبَقُونَا بِالْإِيمَانِ وَلَا تَجْعَلْ فِي قُلُوبِنَا غِلًّا لِلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ رَءُوفٌ رَحِيمٌ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana-ghfir lana wa li-ikhwaninal-ladhina sabaquna bil-iman, wa la taj'al fi qulubina ghillan lilladhina amanu, rabbana innaka ra'ufur-rahim
duas.translation: Our Lord, forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith, and put not in our hearts any rancor toward those who believed. Our Lord, You are Kind and Merciful.
duas.meaning: A beautiful Quranic dua for unity.

duas.title: Dua for Spouse and Offspring (Prophet Ibrahim)
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي مُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةِ وَمِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِي، رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَاءِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbij-'alni muqimas-salati wa min dhurriyyati, rabbana wa taqabbal du'a
duas.translation: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and from my descendants. Our Lord, accept my supplication.
duas.meaning: Dua of Prophet Ibrahim ('a).

duas.title: Dua Entering Upon Children
duas.arabic: بَارَكَ اللَّهُ فِيكُمْ
duas.transliteration: Barakallahu fikum
duas.translation: May Allah bless you all.
duas.meaning: A simple Prophetic blessing.

duas.title: Dua Travel — Full Version
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَى، وَمِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضَى
duas.transliteration: Allahu akbar (3x). Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin, wa inna ila rabbina la-munqalibun. Allahumma inna nas'aluka fi safarina hadhal-birra wat-taqwa, wa minal-'amali ma tarda
duas.translation: Allah is the Greatest (3x). Glory is to Him who subjected this to us… O Allah, we ask You on this journey of ours for goodness and piety, and for deeds that please You.
duas.meaning: The Prophetic travel dua (longer form).

duas.title: Dua upon Returning from Journey
duas.arabic: آيِبُونَ تَائِبُونَ عَابِدُونَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ
duas.transliteration: Ayibuna ta'ibuna 'abiduna li-rabbina hamidun
duas.translation: Returning, repenting, worshipping, and praising our Lord.
duas.meaning: Said upon return from a journey.

duas.title: Dua Descending a Valley
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Subhanallah
duas.translation: Glory is to Allah.
duas.meaning: Said when descending; the Prophet ﷺ would say 'Allahu akbar' when ascending a hill.

duas.title: Dua at Safa and Marwa
duas.arabic: إِنَّ الصَّفَا وَالْمَرْوَةَ مِنْ شَعَائِرِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Innas-safa wal-marwata min sha'a'irillah
duas.translation: Indeed, Safa and Marwa are among the symbols of Allah.
duas.meaning: Recited when starting the Sa'i.

duas.title: Dua at Arafah
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallah, wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir
duas.translation: There is no deity but Allah, alone with no partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things competent.
duas.meaning: The best dua is the dua of the Day of Arafah.

duas.title: Dua Between the Two Corners (Tawaf)
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina 'adhaban-nar
duas.translation: Our Lord, grant us in this world good and in the Hereafter good, and save us from the punishment of the Fire.
duas.meaning: The Prophet ﷺ recited this between the Yemeni corner and the Black Stone.

duas.title: Dua Sighting the Crescent
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَهِلَّهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْيُمْنِ وَالْإِيمَانِ، وَالسَّلَامَةِ وَالْإِسْلَامِ، رَبِّي وَرَبُّكَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ahillahu 'alayna bil-yumni wal-iman, was-salamati wal-islam, Rabbi wa Rabbukal-lah
duas.translation: O Allah, bring it upon us with blessing and faith, safety and Islam. My Lord and your Lord (O moon) is Allah.
duas.meaning: Said when sighting the new crescent.

duas.title: Sahur Intention — Nawaytu Sawma Ghad
duas.arabic: نَوَيْتُ صَوْمَ غَدٍ عَنْ أَدَاءِ فَرْضِ الصِّيَامِ لِهَذَا الشَّهْرِ الْمُبَارَكِ
duas.transliteration: Nawaytu sawma ghadin 'an ada'i fardis-siyami li-hadhash-shahril-mubarak
duas.translation: I intend to fast tomorrow fulfilling the obligation of fasting for this blessed month.
duas.meaning: A niyyah is sufficient in the heart; this is a recommended wording.
duas.reference: Derived from the fiqh principle — actions are by intentions, Bukhari 1

duas.title: Protection from Evil Eye
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّةِ، مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ، وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لَامَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bi-kalimatillahit-tammah, min kulli shaytanin wa hammah, wa min kulli 'aynin lammah
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from every devil and poisonous creature, and from every envious eye.
duas.meaning: The Prophet ﷺ used this to seek refuge for Al-Hasan and Al-Husayn.

duas.title: Refuge from Fitnah
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْفِتَنِ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهَا وَمَا بَطَنَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-fitani ma zahara minha wa ma batan
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from trials — those that are apparent and those that are hidden.
duas.meaning: Protection from seen and unseen tribulations.

duas.title: Protection from the Four Corners
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنِي مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيَّ، وَمِنْ خَلْفِي، وَعَنْ يَمِينِي، وَعَنْ شِمَالِي، وَمِنْ فَوْقِي، وَأَعُوذُ بِعَظَمَتِكَ أَنْ أُغْتَالَ مِنْ تَحْتِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-hfazni min bayni yadayya, wa min khalfi, wa 'an yamini, wa 'an shimali, wa min fawqi, wa a'udhu bi-'azamatika an ughtala min tahti
duas.translation: O Allah, guard me from before me, behind me, to my right, to my left, and from above me; and I seek refuge in Your magnificence from being taken unaware from below me.
duas.meaning: Comprehensive protection dua.

duas.title: Dua for Allah-taught Knowledge
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ انْفَعْنِي بِمَا عَلَّمْتَنِي، وَعَلِّمْنِي مَا يَنْفَعُنِي، وَزِدْنِي عِلْمًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-nfa'ni bima 'allamtani, wa 'allimni ma yanfa'uni, wa zidni 'ilma
duas.translation: O Allah, benefit me with what You have taught me, teach me what will benefit me, and increase me in knowledge.
duas.meaning: A dua regularly recited by the Prophet ﷺ.

duas.title: Dua Before Studying
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ عَلَيَّ فُتُوحَ الْعَارِفِينَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-ftah 'alayya futuhal-'arifin
duas.translation: O Allah, open for me the openings of the knowledgeable ones.
duas.meaning: A recommended practice among scholars.

duas.title: When Something is Difficult
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma la sahla illa ma ja'altahu sahla, wa anta taj'alul-hazna idha shi'ta sahla
duas.translation: O Allah, nothing is easy except what You make easy; You make difficulty, if You will, easy.
duas.meaning: A dua from the Prophet ﷺ for difficulty.

duas.title: Dua on Approaching Spouse
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، اللَّهُمَّ جَنِّبْنَا الشَّيْطَانَ، وَجَنِّبِ الشَّيْطَانَ مَا رَزَقْتَنَا
duas.transliteration: Bismillah, Allahumma jannibnash-shaytan, wa jannibish-shaytana ma razaqtana
duas.translation: In the name of Allah. O Allah, keep us away from Satan and keep Satan away from what You bless us with.
duas.meaning: If a child is decreed from this intimacy, shaytan will never harm that child.

duas.title: Dua for a Righteous Spouse
duas.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ زَوْجَةً طَيِّبَةً، أَقْبِلْ بِقَلْبِهَا عَلَيَّ، وَأَقْبِلْ بِقَلْبِي عَلَيْهَا
duas.transliteration: Rabbi hab li min ladunka zawjatan tayyibah, aqbil bi-qalbiha 'alayya, wa aqbil bi-qalbi 'alayha
duas.translation: My Lord, grant me from Yourself a righteous spouse; turn her heart to me and turn my heart to her.
duas.meaning: A dua for a pious companion.
duas.reference: Recommended wording based on Qur'an 25:74 and Prophetic duas

duas.title: Istikhara — After Naming the Matter
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ خَيْرٌ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي فَاقْدُرْهُ لِي وَيَسِّرْهُ لِي ثُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِيهِ، وَإِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ شَرٌّ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّي وَاصْرِفْنِي عَنْهُ وَاقْدُرْ لِيَ الْخَيْرَ حَيْثُ كَانَ ثُمَّ أَرْضِنِي بِهِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma in kunta ta'lamu anna hadhal-amra khayrun li fi dini wa ma'ashi wa 'aqibati amri faqdurhu li wa yassirhu li thumma barik li fihi, wa in kunta ta'lamu anna hadhal-amra sharrun li fi dini wa ma'ashi wa 'aqibati amri fasrifhu 'anni wasrifni 'anhu, waqdur liyal-khayra haythu kana thumma ardini bihi
duas.translation: O Allah, if You know that this matter is good for me in my religion, my livelihood and my final outcome — then ordain it for me, make it easy, and bless me in it. And if You know it is bad… then turn it away from me and me from it, and ordain for me what is good wherever it may be, and make me pleased with it.
duas.meaning: Said after the naming of the specific matter in istikhara.

duas.title: Dua Before a Big Decision
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَلْهِمْنِي رُشْدِي، وَأَعِذْنِي مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma alhimni rushdi, wa a'idhni min sharri nafsi
duas.translation: O Allah, inspire me with right guidance, and protect me from the evil of my own self.
duas.meaning: Said to seek wisdom in decisions.

duas.title: Istiftah — Opening after Takbir
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ، وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ، وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ، وَلَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanaka-llahumma wa bi-hamdika, wa tabarakas-muka, wa ta'ala jadduka, wa la ilaha ghayruk
duas.translation: Glory is to You, O Allah, and praise; blessed is Your name and exalted is Your majesty. There is no deity besides You.
duas.meaning: Opening supplication after the first takbir.

duas.title: Tashahhud
duas.arabic: التَّحِيَّاتُ لِلَّهِ وَالصَّلَوَاتُ وَالطَّيِّبَاتُ، السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ وَرَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ، السَّلَامُ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَى عِبَادِ اللَّهِ الصَّالِحِينَ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ، وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
duas.transliteration: At-tahiyyatu lillah, was-salawatu wat-tayyibat. As-salamu 'alayka ayyuhan-nabiyyu wa rahmatullahi wa barakatuh. As-salamu 'alayna wa 'ala 'ibadillahis-salihin. Ashhadu an la ilaha illa-llah, wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluh
duas.translation: All compliments, prayers and pure words are due to Allah. Peace be upon you, O Prophet, and Allah's mercy and blessings. Peace be upon us and upon the righteous servants of Allah. I bear witness that none is worthy of worship but Allah, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and messenger.
duas.meaning: Recited while sitting in salah.

duas.title: Before Reciting the Qur'an
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ، بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajim. Bismillahir-rahmanir-rahim
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan. In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
duas.meaning: Recite isti'adha and basmalah before reciting.

duas.title: Dua for Memorization and Understanding
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْحَمْنِي بِالْقُرْآنِ، وَاجْعَلْهُ لِي إِمَامًا وَنُورًا وَهُدًى وَرَحْمَةً، اللَّهُمَّ ذَكِّرْنِي مِنْهُ مَا نَسِيتُ، وَعَلِّمْنِي مِنْهُ مَا جَهِلْتُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-rhamni bil-Qur'an, waj'alhu li imaman wa nuran wa hudan wa rahma. Allahumma dhakkirni minhu ma nasitu, wa 'allimni minhu ma jahiltu
duas.translation: O Allah, have mercy on me through the Qur'an and make it for me a leader, a light, guidance and a mercy. O Allah, remind me of what I have forgotten of it and teach me of what I am ignorant.
duas.meaning: Dua from the righteous predecessors.

duas.title: Closing the Eyes of the Deceased
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِفُلَانٍ، وَارْفَعْ دَرَجَتَهُ فِي الْمَهْدِيِّينَ، وَاخْلُفْهُ فِي عَقِبِهِ فِي الْغَابِرِينَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-ghfir li-fulan, warfa' darajatahu fil-mahdiyyin, wakhlufhu fi 'aqibihi fil-ghabirin
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive so-and-so, raise his rank among those who are guided, and succeed him among those he left behind.
duas.meaning: Said upon closing the eyes of the deceased.

duas.title: Upon Hearing of a Death
duas.arabic: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ
duas.transliteration: Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un
duas.translation: Indeed, we belong to Allah and indeed to Him we shall return.
duas.meaning: Recited upon any loss or hearing of death.

duas.title: Before entering the toilet
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبْثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi, Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-khubthi wal-khaba'ith
duas.translation: In the name of Allah. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the male and female devils.
duas.meaning: Protection from shayateen in places of impurity.

duas.title: After leaving the toilet
duas.arabic: غُفْرَانَكَ
duas.transliteration: Ghufranaka
duas.translation: I seek Your forgiveness.
duas.meaning: Seeking forgiveness for not being able to remember Allah while inside.

duas.title: Before Wudu (Ablution)
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.
duas.meaning: The Prophet said there is no wudu for one who does not mention Allah's name.

duas.title: After Wudu
duas.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
duas.transliteration: Ashhadu an la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lahu, wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluh
duas.translation: I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and Messenger.
duas.meaning: Whoever says this, all eight gates of Paradise are opened for him.

duas.title: When wearing a garment
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي كَسَانِي هَذَا (الثَّوْبَ) وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi kasani hadha (ath-thawb) wa razaqanihi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah
duas.translation: Praise is to Allah who has clothed me with this (garment) and provided it for me, though I was powerless myself and incapable.
duas.meaning: His past sins will be forgiven.

duas.title: When undressing
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.
duas.meaning: A screen between the Jinn and the private parts of the children of Adam.

duas.title: Istighfar after Prayer
duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ. اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ، تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullah (3x). Allahumma antas-salam wa minkas-salam, tabarakta ya dhal-jalali wal-ikram
duas.translation: I seek the forgiveness of Allah (3x). O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, O Owner of majesty and honor.
duas.meaning: The immediate remembrance after concluding the prayer.

duas.title: Forgetting to say Bismillah before eating
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ أَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi awwalahu wa akhirahu
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, in its beginning and its end.
duas.meaning: If one forgets at the start of the meal.

duas.title: Going to the Mosque
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِي قَلْبِي نُورًا، وَفِي لِسَانِي نُورًا، وَاجْعَلْ فِي سَمْعِي نُورًا، وَاجْعَلْ فِي بَصَرِي نُورًا
duas.transliteration: Allahummaj'al fi qalbi nuran, wa fi lisani nuran, waj'al fi sam'i nuran, waj'al fi basari nuran
duas.translation: O Allah, place light in my heart, and on my tongue light, and in my ears light and in my sight light.
duas.meaning: Seeking Allah's light and guidance while walking to the mosque.

duas.title: Entering the Mosque
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَالصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ، اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi was-salatu was-salamu 'ala rasulillahi, Allahummaftah li abwaba rahmatik
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, and blessings and peace be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, open the gates of Your mercy for me.
duas.meaning: Invoking peace on the Prophet and seeking Allah's mercy inside His house.

duas.title: Leaving the Mosque
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَالصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi was-salatu was-salamu 'ala rasulillahi, Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, and blessings and peace be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, I ask You from Your bounty.
duas.meaning: Seeking Allah's bounty upon leaving to face the worldly affairs.

duas.title: Entering the Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa 'ala rabbina tawakkalna
duas.translation: In the name of Allah we enter, in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we depend.
duas.meaning: Keeping shaytan out of the house by remembering Allah.

duas.title: Leaving the Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi tawakkaltu 'alal-lahi, la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.
duas.meaning: Protection from harm when leaving the house.

duas.title: Best way to praise Allah
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ عَدَدَ خَلْقِهِ، وَرِضَا نَفْسِهِ، وَزِنَةَ عَرْشِهِ، وَمِدَادَ كَلِمَاتِهِ
duas.transliteration: Subhanallahi wa bihamdihi, 'adada khalqihi, wa rida nafsihi, wa zinata 'arshihi, wa midada kalimatihi
duas.translation: Glory is to Allah and praise is to Him, by the multitude of His creation, by His Pleasure, by the weight of His Throne, and by the extent of His Words.
duas.meaning: A short dhikr that outweighs hours of regular dhikr on the scales.

duas.title: When seeing something beautiful
duas.arabic: مَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ لَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Ma sha' Allah, la quwwata illa billah
duas.translation: As Allah willed! There is no power but with Allah.
duas.meaning: To prevent evil eye and attribute all blessings to Allah.

duas.title: Morning & Evening Protection
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'as-mihi shai'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwas-sami'ul-'alim
duas.translation: In the Name of Allah with Whose Name there is protection against every kind of harm in the earth or in the heaven, and He is the All-Hearing and All-Knowing.
duas.meaning: Recite 3 times morning and evening to be protected from sudden afflictions.

duas.title: Sayyid al-Istighfar
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ، وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata'tu, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, abu'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u bidhanbi faghfir li, fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa anta.
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You, You created me and I am Your servant and I abide to Your covenant and promise as best I can, I take refuge in You from the evil of which I have committed. I acknowledge Your favour upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for verily none can forgive sin except You.
duas.meaning: The chief of prayers for forgiveness. Whoever says it during the day with firm belief and dies on that day will be from the people of Paradise.

duas.title: When afflicted with a calamity
duas.arabic: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ، اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي وَأَخْلِفْ لِي خَيْرًا مِنْهَا
duas.transliteration: Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un, Allahumma'-jurni fi musibati wa akhlif li khayran minha
duas.translation: To Allah we belong and unto Him is our return. O Allah, recompense me for my affliction and replace it for me with something better.
duas.meaning: Acceptance of decree and seeking better compensation from Allah.

duas.title: Dua for anxiety and sorrow
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ، وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan, wal-'ajzi wal-kasal, wal-bukhli wal-jubn, wa dala'id-dayni wa ghalabatir-rijal
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, miserliness and cowardice, the burden of debts and from being overpowered by men.
duas.meaning: Comprehensive protection from all forms of mental and worldly burdens.

duas.title: For settling heavy debts
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahummak-fini bihalalika 'an haramika, wa aghnini bifadlika 'amman siwaka
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have allowed instead of what You have forbidden, and make me independent of all others besides You.
duas.meaning: A dua taught by Ali (RA) for paying off debts, even if they were as large as a mountain.

duas.title: Talbiyah
duas.arabic: لَبَّيْكَ اللَّهُمَّ لَبَّيْكَ، لَبَّيْكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ لَبَّيْكَ، إِنَّ الْحَمْدَ وَالنِّعْمَةَ لَكَ وَالْمُلْكَ، لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ
duas.transliteration: Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk, Labbayka la sharika laka Labbayk, Innal-hamda wan-ni'mata laka wal-mulk, la sharika lak
duas.translation: Here I am O Allah, here I am. Here I am, You have no partner, here I am. Verily all praise and blessings are Yours, and all sovereignty, You have no partner.
duas.meaning: The ultimate declaration of readiness and submission during pilgrimage.

duas.title: When the wind blows heavily
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayraha, wa a'udhu bika min sharriha
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for its good and seek refuge with You from its evil.
duas.meaning: Seeking the benefit of the wind (like rain) and protection from its destruction.

duas.title: Upon hearing thunder
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَالْمَلَائِكَةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi yusabbihur-ra'du bihamdihi wal-mala'ikatu min khifatihi
duas.translation: Glory is to Him Whom thunder and angels extol from fear of Him.
duas.meaning: Glorifying Allah at the display of His magnificent power.

duas.title: When someone does you a favor
duas.arabic: جَزَاكَ اللَّهُ خَيْرًا
duas.transliteration: Jazakallahu khayran
duas.translation: May Allah reward you with goodness.
duas.meaning: The Prophet said whoever says this has expressed the utmost gratitude.

duas.title: When entering the marketplace
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ، وَهُوَ حَيٌّ لَا يَمُوتُ، بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْرُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu, yuhyi wa yumitu, wa huwa hayyun la yamutu, biyadihil-khayru, wa huwa 'ala kulli shai'in qadir
duas.translation: None has the right to be worshipped but Allah alone, Who has no partner. His is the dominion and His is the praise. He brings life and He causes death, and He is living and does not die. In His Hand is all good, and He is Able to do all things.
duas.meaning: Massive reward is promised for remembering Allah in places of commerce and distraction.

duas.title: Dua for Firm Faith
duas.arabic: يَا مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوبِ ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلَى دِينِكَ
duas.transliteration: Ya Muqallibal-qulub, thabbit qalbi 'ala dinik
duas.translation: O Changer of the hearts, make my heart firm upon Your religion.
duas.meaning: The most frequent invocation of the Prophet (SAW) to maintain faith.

duas.title: Dua for Firm Faith

duas.title: Dua for Forgiveness
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Rabbighfir li wa tub 'alayya innaka antat-Tawwabur-Rahim
duas.translation: My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance, You are the Ever-Relenting, the Most Merciful.
duas.meaning: Seeking constant forgiveness.

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْأَعْلَى
duas.transliteration: Subhana Rabbiyal-A'la
duas.translation: Glory is to my Lord, the Most High.
duas.meaning: Praising Allah in the lowest physical state.

duas.title: A Powerful Dhikr
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina 'adhaban-nar
duas.translation: Our Lord, give us in this world [that which is] good and in the Hereafter [that which is] good and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
duas.meaning: A comprehensive and authentic supplication relating to sleep.

duas.title: Seeking Ultimate Well-being
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-'afiyata fid-dunya wal-akhirah
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for well-being in this world and the Hereafter.
duas.meaning: A comprehensive and authentic supplication relating to sleep.

duas.title: Seeking Ease and Goodness
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ

duas.translation: Our Lord, give us in this world [that which is] good and in the Hereafter [that which is] good and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
duas.meaning: A comprehensive and authentic supplication relating to toilet.

duas.title: Plea for Forgiveness

duas.title: Plea for Forgiveness
duas.arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي
duas.transliteration: Rabbish-rah li sadri wa yassir li amri
duas.translation: My Lord, expand for me my breast [with assurance] and ease for me my task.
duas.meaning: A comprehensive and authentic supplication relating to toilet.

duas.title: Dua for Steadfastness
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي كُلَّهُ دِقَّهُ وَجِلَّهُ وَأَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ وَعَلَانِيَتَهُ وَسِرَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahummagh-fir li dhanbi kullahu, diqqahu wa jillahu, wa awwalahu wa akhirahu, wa 'alaniyatahu wa sirrahu
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me all my sins, great and small, the first and the last, those that are apparent and those that are hidden.
duas.meaning: A comprehensive and authentic supplication relating to toilet.

duas.title: Remembering Allah
duas.arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ
duas.transliteration: Ya Hayyu Ya Qayyum, bi-rahmatika astaghith
duas.translation: O Living, O Sustaining, in Your Mercy I seek relief.
duas.meaning: A comprehensive and authentic supplication relating to toilet.

duas.title: Invocation for Peace
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ

duas.meaning: A comprehensive and authentic supplication relating to toilet.
